message:
feat(freeze): Add get_ref_value opcode Zig support

Convert get_ref_value opcode to support both C and Zig output.
This opcode gets a property value from a reference (for variable access).

Stack effect: [obj, prop] -> [obj, prop, value] (pushes 1)

Implementation:
- Reads obj and prop from stack without popping
- Checks if obj is undefined (reference error)
- Throws ReferenceError with property name if undefined
- Gets property value using JS_GetPropertyValue
- Duplicates prop before passing to GetPropertyValue
- Checks for exception and returns if error
- Pushes result value to stack
- In Zig: uses @intCast for stack indexing, returns directly on error
- In C: uses next_block = -1 and break on error

Also fixed unused variable warning for is_tail_recursive_call.
